title: Welcome Home
overview: Yuuko runs into trouble when she and Miki Saotome go after the same unlicensed Monster.

title: Touch a Maiden's Hair
overview: The Mobile Shinsengumi team must work to find a way to pay their massive debt.

title: Let Your Skin Glow in the Steam
overview: Yuuko tries to set up Sazaku and Ryuunosuke. Meanwhile Gennai convinces Nekomata to participate in an experiment.

title: For Sport and Play I Think We Were Born
overview: Yuuko, Toshie, and Kaoru are teaching Ryuunosuke about the wonders of women - and then he meets Koyuki.

title: Make My Heart Race
overview: Miki and Ukon summon a monster to kill Ryuunosuke. Gennai’s creation - a mechanical marionette of Toshie's mother - goes berserk!

title: Feelings Shining in the Glow of Sunset
overview: Yuuko wants a handsome celebrity to flirt with Sazaku to make Ryuunosuke jealous - but the star has other interests.

title: The Direction of Love Is Left to the Gods
overview: Even though it will hurt her heart, Kaoru uses a Goddess to make Sazaku and Ryuunosuke fall in love.

title: Dyed in the Color of a Girl
overview: Nekomata revives Ryuunosuke when he dies - but she gives him a girl’s soul!

title: Thoughts of Mother, Reflecting on the Moon
overview: The Mobile Shinsengumi is after a monster that disguises itself as a candy man to steal the spirits of children.

title: Overwhelming Sorrow from the Lost Feeling
overview: When the Mobile Shinsengumi investigates a rash of Monster disappearances, they find themselves facing the Tsubame Group once more.

title: Not a Marriage Vow, but Mischief
overview: Ryuunosuke fiancé shows up and causes all kinds of trouble, but he may still have to marry her in order to pay off a debt!

title: Fall in Love, Than Struggle and Droop
overview: Miki and Ukon meet a vampire. Meanwhile, Yuuko trys to keep Ryuunosuke and his fiancé from leaving.
